lotteryDescription:
Belle Gardens Phase 2 is pleased to announce that applications are now being accepted for 32 newly constructed Cooperative Apartments. Eligible buyers should have 10% of the purchase price available for down payment. The below figures are based on an assumption of a 10% down payment, but other down payment percentages might be permissible based on lender approval.

Please note that the quoted sales prices, maximum household income, asset limit, etc., are estimated and are subject to change.

EACH BUYER MUST OCCUPY THE COOPERATIVE APARTMENT AS THEIR PRIMARY RESIDENCE.
ANY PROSPECTIVE APPLICANT WHO CURRENTLY OWNS OR PREVIOUSLY HAS PURCHASED A RESIDENTIAL PROPERTY IS INELIGIBLE. An online Informational sessions will be held on: Thursday, June 11, 2026 at 6:00PM. https://us02web.zoom.us/j/86020864617?pwd=scTKa9UXsZyaFT56VpOBedPmO86Spi.1
Meeting ID: 860 2086 4617 
Passcode: 085964
Seminar attendance is not mandatory to purchase a Cooperative Apartment.
amenities: Elevator,Outdoor areas,Patio or balcony,Washers and dryers in units

lotteryDescription:
Discover Las Raíces: Modern Living in the Heart of East Harlem Experience the vibrant energy and rich cultural heritage of Manhattan’s East Harlem at Las Raíces, a collection of 65 newly constructed residences designed for modern comfort and community connection. Spread across four distinct locations—303 East 102nd Street, 338 East 117th Street, 505 East 118th Street, and 101 East 122nd Street (1761 Park Ave)—this project offers the rare opportunity to secure a fresh, contemporary home in one of New York City's most storied neighborhoods.
Designed for Your Lifestyle:Every building within the Las Raíces portfolio is crafted with convenience and security in mind. Residents will enjoy:
•Modern Essentials: On-site laundry rooms, elevator access, and dedicated bike storage.
•Peace of Mind: Secured lobbies providing a safe and welcoming entrance.
Tenants are responsible for electricity, including electric stove. Rent includes heating and hot water. NO PETS policy.

Each aspect has been designed for ease and enjoyment, with a suite of amenities such as a garage* and bike storage, making city living effortless. Stay active with a fully equipped gym*, or spend time with friends and family in the lounge*, media room*, recreation room*, or co-working space*. Residents can also enjoy the outdoor and rooftop terraces*, including a sundeck*, BBQ grills*, and kitchens*. Two pets per apartment, maximum 40 lbs each; breed restrictions apply. Tenant is responsible for electricity including stove and heat. Rent includes electricity for hot water

lotteryDescription: Exceptional residences. Quality beyond compare. Waterline Square presents apartments that position your home as a space for exceptional living. These residences feature expansive, light-filled layouts, modern finishes, and windows with sweeping city views. The Waterline Club, located on the lower levels of Waterline Square, offers a wide range of amenities. A membership fee is required to join the Waterline Club, and access is reserved exclusively for resident members. Amenities include fitness* and wellness spaces*, sports courts*, entertainment lounges*, and features such as a rock-climbing wall*, skate park*, and golf simulator*. The spa area includes a pool*, hot tub*, steam rooms*, and saunas*. Waterline Square invites residents to experience a reimagined standard of modern living. (*fees apply) Tenants are responsible for electricity. Rent includes heat, hot water, and gas for cooking.

lotteryDescription:
Elevated living in Brooklyn at Botanic Heights - 960 Franklin Avenue, a striking new residential community bringing 91 affordable apartments to one of the borough’s most vibrant neighborhoods. Residences feature dishwashers and private patios or balconies. Residents can enjoy an electronic doorman, elevator access, and online payment options. An optional amenity package is available for $75/month for one-bedroom residents and $125/month for two-bedroom residents, and includes access to the yoga studio, coworking room, party room, social lounge, and children’s room. Additional optional amenities include a fitness center ($50/month), and on-site parking ($400/month).
Applicants can install and use washer/dryers for a surcharge, which may be set by applicable law. One pet per household (up to 20 lbs.) is permitted with no pet deposit required; service animals are welcome!
Tenants are responsible for electricity, stove, and electric heat/cool split unit. Hot water is included in the rent.

These apartments feature in-unit washers and dryers, dishwashers, and spacious layouts — all in a pet-friendly building welcoming 1 pet up to 50 lbs. with no pet deposit required. Service animals are always welcome.

lotteryDescription:
Rialto West is a newly constructed mixed-income rental building in Hell’s Kitchen offering studio, one-, two-, and three-bedroom apartments. Located near public transit, dining, and shopping, the property features a fitness room, laundry room, broadband internet access, and a pet-friendly policy (restrictions apply; 40 lb. maximum). The building includes a ground-floor arts and community space operated separately by IndieSpace. The space is intended for public-facing arts/community use and is not a residential amenity or exclusive resident space. The building is also located next to a new public open space. Tenants are responsible for electricity. Manhattan Community Board 4 preference applies.
 
To request an application by mail, send a self-addressed, stamped envelope to: Rialto West, c/o Clinton Management, 42-06 235th Street, Douglaston, NY 11363.
